This little e-zine ad right here what we're going to talk about here was the literally the beginning of me using newsletter marketing So that's what almost almost five years now, it's really almost five years now and That's it's pretty cool for me just to look back and show you this and tell you that every single month Since this ad I've had newsletter ads running generating leads for me and now It's pretty much something that's I'm good at I don't know how to say it. Maybe it'll make me an extra million bucks this year, but next year it could detrimentally affect my business in a huge way so In other words 20 pillars is better than one one pillar goes down if you got one your business Implodes 20 pillars one pillar goes down you barely even notice it So it's important to diversify if you want to stable long-term business So Let's get into some traffic basis. This is important stuff that we need to know we need to understand Before we get in we start playing around on the net I Want to give you guys my simple definition of targeted traffic because I like to keep things and incredibly simple when I do things And how I think and in my mind all All our business is essentially based on getting eyeballs of interested people In front of what we have to offer. That's it Find a group of people who could have who could be interested in what you have to offer put your link in front of them When they click that link that's targeted traffic And so when I say that a lot of people say yeah, they're gonna get it But what I want you to do right now is I want to take you I want you to take a second and kind of pause and think about this Think about right now what you do online The reason I say that's because your prospects are just like you I Know that earlier today. That's all that's all you got to do find people get them to like you share cool stuff that's it Name of the game is to be in front of your prospects in as many places as humanly possible and You went So think about today right now right down even on a piece of paper Because I'm going through some of this stuff what you did online today Because likely your prospects are just like you and they're doing the same thing What did you search for today in Google? Maybe that's a good keyword to set up a Google add-on. I don't know Maybe it's a good keyword to write an article on I don't know That's the name of the game though Put you find people put your link in front of them when they click it that is targeted traffic so Another thing I want to talk to you guys about in in traffic basics here the three more bullet points I want to go through is the difference between paid verse free traffic paid verse free and And Really the only difference between the two is speed and Here's what I want to say because I've done this stuff for a little while now and Invariably when a new person comes to me I'll give them several different options of what they could do and should do to start sparking success in their business and like 90% of them will say oh, well, I think I'm gonna get started with the free stuff And I know why because we all we start out with kind of an employee mindset We're like well just give me three steps. Give me three steps. Give me three steps. Give me three steps and We want as little risk as possible because we're not really thinking about our business as like McDonald's franchise owner as we're thinking about it as like Well, I really hope this works to keep our fingers crossed so we're we're not willing to risk our money Which I think is wrong. It's just you got to change your mindset But the reason that I that I want to bring up this point about paid verse free is I don't always think that free is the best way to go for a lot of people and the reason is I See a lot of people Peter out because to make the free stuff work. You got to work. You got to put some elbow grease into it To this day from articles I've submitted five years ago I still get traffic and leads but there's literally like almost 800 articles out there now and there should be more I just haven't done more That's some serious elbow grease to get that stuff to work and it takes time a lot of people lose heart and and give up on themselves because they're trying to reduce risk by going the freeway and Because they're not positively reinforcing their own success They give up go back to well life isn't so bad and they quit their business If your person like me that needs some positive reinforcement like on a daily basis like I'm a got it I always want to see how many sales I got today. I always want to see what's going on How many leads I got today? I know how many leads I got 20 minutes ago because I look right before we started You really should think about Using paid media because you get traffic immediately So you're gonna walk out by the end of tonight and you're gonna have a strategy to get traffic Specifically on a specific day and it's going to come you're going to get leads from it. That is positive reinforcement Whereas the other way sure you're gonna get results But you got a way you got you do you this is just how it goes So the quality is the same in fact some of the free stuff can in terms of my numbers I actually have you know more sales conversions per lead But you got it takes a while to build up steam that way So if you want results fast and you know Psychologically your person needs positive reinforcement to continue to have fuel to succeed You might want to reframe how you think about what you're doing in your business and this is just what all these things I'm telling you some of the things I had to figure out my own mind to get right in order to succeed so Just take it as that So we're gonna be talking about paid traffic. That's what newsletter marketing is And I want to give you a distinction between Even even within that even between paid traffic Maybe you don't know there are actually two types of paid Advertising that you can do online if we want to lump them into big things There's what's called a fixed cost marketing and there's performance-based marketing And the strategy to be successful with either is different So example newsletter marketing is fixed cost marketing The reason that people shy away from it We'll talk about it in a few minutes as we go and play around is because well What happens if I pay a hundred dollars for a newsletter? And absolutely nothing happens so people get fearful of that Well, if you do your homework right and you do the steps we're gonna go through you'll be fine But if you're in a fixed cost marketing world meaning like you paid for it Banner advertising is another example of fixed cost marketing the name of the game is to extract the maximum amount of results possible And you're gonna see how that plays out when we talk about newsletter marketing in just a second The other type of paid media in my opinion is performance based So performance based media is you only pay per for a particular performance A quintessential example of that sort of marketing is pay-per-click marketing So with pay-per-click marketing you only pay when someone sees your ad and clicks on it So if in a fixed cost world we have to pay this amount of money in order to make and realize as much revenue as possible We got a driver's also through the roof So we got to do we got a market a certain way It's actually the opposite approach that we take with performance base Because with performance based media We're basically saying to ourselves is Since I'm only paying on performance. I only want to pay and create performance For people that really want what I got So it's actually better to disqualify people in a performance based world Like for instance, it actually works in your favor And I'm simplifying this we there's levels of kind of complexity we could get into If in for instance in a pay-per-click world you said Instead of hey, here's how to get a million leads or here's how to like fix all your problems If you said what's the biggest problem you knew absolutely what the biggest problem is for your market And you said here's how to fix that problem It's going to take you a month You'll likely succeed and it's going to cost you 97 bucks The only person that's clicking on that ad is the person that's really got that problem and really wants it fixed So you pay less and have a much higher ROI based on performance So I wanted to make sure because this isn't one of the things that was ever talked to me talked to me I kind of had to decipher this piece myself And so and the way that you're going to use this in the future in your business is you're going to say When you approach an opportunity to advertise online in a paid media You're going to ask yourself is this a fixed-cost media or is this performance base? And you're going to know in a fixed-cost world I need to drive maximum results So what can I do to drive maximum results in a performance based world? You're going to say well, I want to really qualify some only paying for Exactly what I want And that's how you're going to use that in the future Brian. Does that make sense? Yeah, man. Yeah, definitely sweet. All right
